latestNews.label: Season 8.5
latestNews.title: Cyclops enters the roster
latestNews.description: The mid-season update is reported to add Cyclops as a Duelist with optic blast pressure, ricochet-style beams, mobility back toward cover, and an ultimate built around removing the visor.
latestNews.thumbnailAlt: Marvel Rivals Season 8.5 artwork featuring Cyclops

latestNews.label: Battle Pass
latestNews.title: Project: Heroic Age is the current Season 8 BattlePass
latestNews.description: The Marvel Rivals Wiki lists Season 8: Sins of Alchemax as current, with the Season 8 BattlePass named Project: Heroic Age.
latestNews.thumbnailAlt: Project: Heroic Age Season 8 Battle Pass promotional artwork

latestNews.label: Mode Update
latestNews.title: Bounty Annihilation and K'un-Lun Shenloong Arena
latestNews.description: Season 8.5 coverage reports an 18v18 mode and dedicated K'un-Lun Shenloong Arena map arriving with the mid-season patch.
latestNews.thumbnailAlt: Marvel Rivals 18 versus 18 Annihilation mode artwork

latestNews.label: Events
latestNews.title: Summer Festival, 616 Day Vault, and Path to Doomsday updates
latestNews.description: Reported mid-season items include a summer event with free Units, a limited 616 Day Vault return, and revised timing for Path to Doomsday phases.
latestNews.thumbnailAlt: Emma Frost hero artwork used as a Summer Festival thumbnail

featuredGuides.title: Strategic Cover Usage
featuredGuides.description: Minimize your hitbox, isolate one angle, scout before peeking, and return to safety after each shot.

featuredGuides.title: Power Positions
featuredGuides.description: Use map locations that create options, passive pressure, information, and safer objective control.

featuredGuides.title: Starter Fundamentals Path
featuredGuides.description: A five-lesson route through cover, high ground, rotations, timing, and target priority.

currentFocusDescription: Mid-season coverage highlights Cyclops, Bounty Annihilation, K'un-Lun Shenloong Arena, Summer Festival rewards, and the returning 616 Day Vault.
